🖼️ **WSOPC TEXAS DEBUT — Show Graphic**
B BLOCK open. First-ever WSOP Circuit in Texas (Apr 23–May 4) at TCH Austin. Red sub-bar carries the Lodge-still-frozen contrast.

🖼️ **ZOBIAN USPO EVENT #9 — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK Item 1. Aram Zobian wins USPO Event #9 ($292,800) — heads-up hand callout (K♠6♠ vs A♥9♥, paired-sixes board) + final-table context.

🖼️ **NATNA FOUNDATION — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK Item 1 sub-card. The story behind the win — Natna Children's Foundation, co-founded by Aram Zobian. Pairs with the USPO results card.

🖼️ **POLYMARKET PULSE — Show Graphic**
Recurring-segment 4-quadrant card, as of 3am PT · Apr 22. NBA 51% · Stanley Cup 25% · 2026 World Cup Spain 16% · ATP Sinner 56%.

🖼️ **COOK HANDS OFF APPLE — Show Graphic**
World Intel — A Block cutaway. $4T market cap + Tim Cook → John Ternus succession (announced Apr 20).

🖼️ **HIGH ROLLER CASHES ≠ PROFITS — Show Graphic**
A BLOCK. 3-row receipts card: Chidwick $76M cashes / $5–10M profit · Peters $49.65M / ~$25K of $50K Triton stake · Davies ~50% typical hold.

🖼️ **BTC SPOT CHECK — Show Graphic**
World Intel — Investing/culture cutaway. BTC spot $78,000, Apr 22 morning. Flag vs. 30-day trend.
🃏 Foxen USPO Doubleheader ("Filthy Bluff" + Trip Queens Fold) — B Block — Source: https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/david-coleman-wins-uspo-finale-51096.htm
🃏 Foxen "Absolutely Filthy" Bluff — B Block — Source: https://www.poker.org/latest-news/absolutely-filthy-kristen-foxen-pulls-off-wild-bluff-in-us-poker-open-finale-a6KUE9R5QqVG
🃏 Foxen Kings-Fold Callback (Triton Jeju, Doug Polk analysis) — B Block — Source: https://www.spadepoker.com/en/news/doug-polk-analyzes-kristen-foxen-and-the-fold-that-divided-the-poker-world/
🃏 Hellmuth Quad 8s ("When you're the greatest, you make quads") — B Block — Source: https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/hellmuths-home-game-episode-20-recap-51082.htm

🖼️ **KALSHI SUSPENDS 3 CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATES — Show Graphic**
B BLOCK open. Breaking-news alert frame for the prediction-market integrity segment. CNBC, Apr 23.

🖼️ **DeBOER · 7 YEARS · $87.5M — Show Graphic**
C BLOCK lead. Alabama extends Kalen DeBoer — contract-value-first data card. ESPN, Apr 23.

🖼️ **KRISTEN FOXEN'S APRIL — Show Graphic**
A BLOCK lead. Side-by-side dual hand: Filthy Bluff (A♣8♠ vs T♥5♥ on 6♣9♣5♠A♦T♠, 1.2M shove=fold) + Trip Queens Fold (Foxen folds trips to Coleman's pair of sixes). USPO $25K finale.

📎 COLD OPEN — "She didn't say nothin... she just had that look." — r/rareinsults / 24.6k upvotes, #24 r/all today — hold full-screen 3 sec before Matt on camera. Source: intel-staging msg 1496832685279150211
📎 [B BLOCK] Kalshi suspends 3 congressional candidates — CNBC headline + lede screenshot — source for the B-block lead beat. Source: intel-staging msg 1496817346596179968
📎 [B BLOCK] Polymarket trending — Apr 23 open — Friday weekly stock-close boards + Silver >$65 conviction — Polymarket Pulse cutaway after Kalshi beat. Source: intel-staging msg 1496817396734758952
📎 [C BLOCK] NBA playoffs update — Thunder 2-0, Pistons-Magic 1-1, Wemby update — ESPN NBA bracket visual for Wemby/sportsbook segment. Source: intel-staging msg 1496817405589196800
📎 [C BLOCK] Alabama extends DeBoer — 7yr/$87.5M — ESPN full contract terms screenshot — pairs with the DeBOER graphic for the CFB beat. Source: intel-staging msg 1496817376602226717

📎 [C BLOCK] AITA — "Stop coaching my friend at the gym" — 90% upvoted, 59 comments. Gym rail-coach = poker table rail-coach translation. Source: intel-staging msg 1496832950891843746 — https://old.reddit.com/r/AmItheAsshole/comments/1ssw4cb/
📎 [CLOSE] NFL Draft tonight in Pittsburgh — ESPN Draft news / mock boards + trade buzz — Matt's town tease for Friday. Source: intel-staging msg 1496817368339583159
🃏 Coleman Q-8 cracks Foxen's pocket tens — USPO Championship finisher — B Block — Source: https://www.pokernews.com/news/2026/04/david-coleman-wins-uspo-finale-51096.htm

🃏 Foxen folds trip queens to Coleman's pair-of-sixes jam — USPO heads-up setup hand — B Block — Source: https://www.poker.org/latest-news/absolutely-filthy-kristen-foxen-pulls-off-wild-bluff-in-us-poker-open-finale-a6KUE9R5QqVG

🖼️ **POLYMARKET-DOJ-SOLDIER-ARREST** — Show Graphic
A-block lead. Breaking alert card for the federal case against an active-duty soldier charged with using classified intel on a Polymarket bet. `$400,000` hero stat. (Nano declined the live-person/classified-intel framing three times — clean data-card fallback, guaranteed-correct number.)

🖼️ **COLEMAN-FOXEN-HERO-FOLD-FINISHER** — Show Graphic
B-block lead / hand of the day. USPO Championship Event #10 finale — Foxen's trip-queens HERO FOLD set up Coleman's `$420K TITLE` one hand later. (Nano's dual-panel card renders kept mangling the `$420K` → `$400K`; shipped data-card fallback so the number is verifiably correct for broadcast.)

🖼️ **PETERS-APOLOGY-QUOTE-CARD** — Show Graphic
C-block lead. Pull-quote card — Peters' "I deeply regret…" X post on the Linde `$25,000` staking-debt confession. Muted felt, restrained hierarchy, quote does the work.

📎 [COLD OPEN] r/poker "wide range" — Jose Fernandez bare-hands a Tulo rocket / "35o ∈ WIDE RANGE" overlay / top of r/poker today (486 upvotes). Source: https://reddit.com/r/poker/comments/1stxwl0/wide_range/ — intel-staging msg 1497194927006679160

📎 [C BLOCK] Jason Kelce dunks on scouting reports — "written by people who are incapable of fully [evaluating]" — 3.4K likes, pairs with NFL Draft beat. Source: https://x.com/JasonKelce/status/2047469846997139819 — intel-staging msg 1497194995017449555

📎 [C BLOCK Item 4 — CUT FIRST] Polymarket Pulse board — OKC Thunder 52% NBA champ, France 17% FIFA WC, Dem 2028 Newsom 26%, US×Iran peace by Jun 30 = 43%, BTC $150K Dec 31 = 10%. Pairs w/ A-block DOJ soldier framing. Source: polymarket.com — intel-staging msg 1497185317306896454
